title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite Artifact Index

artifacts.title: Project brief
artifacts.shows: Gives first-pass readers a concise project shape before the detailed artifact trail.

artifacts.title: Project brief JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable first-reader project brief for the website and Hugging Face mirrors.

artifacts.title: Project status
artifacts.shows: Gives a compact current-state table for first-pass readers.

artifacts.title: Project status JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable copy of the current project status for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Research roadmap
artifacts.shows: Defines the path from public-sample task development to multi-episode held-out evaluation and larger omni-model extensions.

artifacts.title: Research roadmap JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable research roadmap for the website and Hugging Face mirrors.

artifacts.title: Foundation model plan
artifacts.shows: Defines the post-data-gate backbone choices: Qwen3-Omni first, Cosmos 3 for world modeling, and VLA/policy models after action-target conversion.

artifacts.title: Foundation model plan JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable foundation-model selection matrix with source links, entry conditions, and evaluation additions.

artifacts.title: Omni model extension contract
artifacts.shows: Defines the shared manifest, episode split, held-out evaluation, packaging, and public-safety rules for Qwen3-Omni, Cosmos-style, and VLA/policy model branches.

artifacts.title: Omni backbone registry configs
artifacts.shows: Stores the implemented Qwen3-Omni LoRA contract and planned Cosmos-style world-model and VLA/policy branch contracts.

artifacts.title: Omni backbone registry validator
artifacts.shows: Validates backbone ids, split defaults, leakage guards, required metrics, required files, and forbidden public package categories.

artifacts.title: Model-neutral window index exporter
artifacts.shows: Converts Qwen JSONL records into a model-neutral window index with Qwen, Cosmos-style, and policy/VLA adapter views.

artifacts.title: Omni backbone scaffolder
artifacts.shows: Creates a validated planned-backbone config from an existing contract template so new model families inherit the shared rules.

artifacts.title: Omni backbone packaging smoke test
artifacts.shows: Builds synthetic verified packages for every configured backbone and audits them against the public-safe package contract.

artifacts.title: Qwen3-Omni held-out error-analysis script
artifacts.shows: Computes public-safe held-out error-analysis tables by episode, action family, train-seen status, required-modality state, and object category.

artifacts.title: 128-episode aligned baseline runner
artifacts.shows: Runs simple metadata and neural MLP baselines on the same selected 96/16/16 episode split used by the Qwen3-Omni diagnostic pilot.

artifacts.title: Qwen3 LoRA HF package builder
artifacts.shows: Builds the upload-ready Hugging Face adapter folder from a verified Qwen3 LoRA result summary and adapter directory.

artifacts.title: Additional development directions
artifacts.shows: Records concrete non-backbone Xperience-10M development tracks: taxonomy, benchmark protocol, representation learning, skill graphs, affordances, 3D/4D memory, QA, and policy transfer.

artifacts.title: Additional development directions JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable additional development directions for the website and Hugging Face mirrors.

artifacts.title: Xperience Embodied Foundation Model pretraining goal
artifacts.shows: Describes the future full-corpus Xperience-native pretraining goal, target modules, objectives, staged scale-up, hardware ranges, and evaluation protocol.

artifacts.title: Evidence contract
artifacts.shows: Defines the implemented scope, setup-stage items, and multi-episode prerequisites.

artifacts.title: Project packet
artifacts.shows: Gives a short project path with scope status and public surfaces.

artifacts.title: Artifact guide
artifacts.shows: Gives the human-readable map from project scope to data, tasks, platform mirrors, and scale-up status.

artifacts.title: Official Xperience-10M dataset-card alignment
artifacts.shows: Aligns public dataset wording with the official gated Xperience-10M card, public sample card, HF API metadata, and current project coverage.

artifacts.title: Official Xperience-10M dataset-card alignment JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable upstream dataset-card, sample-card, and HF API alignment facts for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Source alignment
artifacts.shows: Summarizes the pass/fail check for full-dataset facts, sample-card facts, API-listing notes, and project coverage.

artifacts.title: Source alignment JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable source-alignment pass/fail check for repo, website, and HF surfaces.

artifacts.title: Source alignment validator
artifacts.shows: Regenerates the source-alignment report from committed facts and public card text.

artifacts.title: Hugging Face publisher
artifacts.shows: Publishes prepared Space, artifact dataset, and model bundles, including an explicit model-binary upload batch.

artifacts.title: GitHub package Dockerfile
artifacts.shows: Builds the static-dashboard container package for GitHub Container Registry.

artifacts.title: GitHub package workflow
artifacts.shows: Publishes the static-dashboard image to GitHub Container Registry on main or manual dispatch.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol
artifacts.shows: Defines the window unit, chronological split, task metrics, leakage controls, and current limitations.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable protocol generated from committed task metrics for website and HF mirrors.

artifacts.title: Evaluation protocol builder
artifacts.shows: Regenerates the protocol from committed summary metrics and task artifacts.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways
artifacts.shows: Summarizes the main research lessons from committed metrics and identifies which experiments need held-out episodes.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable result interpretation for the website, HF cards, and mirror checks.

artifacts.title: Research takeaways builder
artifacts.shows: Regenerates the research takeaways from committed summary metrics and task result artifacts.

artifacts.title: Audio contribution script
artifacts.shows: Measures audio contribution variants across all 12 task contracts.

artifacts.title: Audio ablation summary
artifacts.shows: Stores per-task audio deltas for all current features, no-audio, audio-only, alternate-audio-only, replacement, and all-plus-alternate variants.

artifacts.title: Audio ablation summary report
artifacts.shows: Human-readable table showing the measured audio contribution and alternate-representation delta for every task.

artifacts.title: Audio ablation website JSON
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable audio ablation summary mirrored into the static website and Hugging Face bundles.

artifacts.title: Audio ablation delta chart
artifacts.shows: Bar chart of measured current-audio primary-metric deltas across the 12 tasks.

artifacts.title: Figure index builder

artifacts.shows: Provides the project logo card used in README, Hugging Face cards, and social previews.

artifacts.title: Brand asset builder

artifacts.title: Release checks

artifacts.title: Release-check manifest
artifacts.shows: Machine-readable release-check summary for validators, mirrors, and public project surfaces.

artifacts.title: Public project surface

artifacts.title: Public project surface builder
artifacts.shows: Regenerates the public presentation report before release.

artifacts.title: Task-surface integrity report

artifacts.title: Rendered website check

artifacts.shows: Machine-readable browser-level website check for the public static site.

artifacts.title: Rendered website check builder
artifacts.shows: Builds the rendered website check from browser observations.

artifacts.title: Task-surface integrity validator
artifacts.shows: Regenerates the task-surface integrity report and fails if task cards expose raw artifact ids or lose the interactive player wiring.

artifacts.title: Live publication status

artifacts.shows: Fetches the published GitHub/HF URLs and compares live hashes and public-card markers against the release assets.

artifacts.shows: Defines public reproduction commands, expected outputs, and non-reproducible scale-up boundaries.

artifacts.title: Artifact index builder
